edgeCases: spike order has no validate step — ungated by absence, not a bypass branch (archetype_safety_test.go)
merge re-validates a promoted spike — executeValidation is step-agnostic
hotfix starts at code with no plan artifact required (integration + TestWA_HotfixOrder)
explicit --archetype flag overrides roadmap + bootstrap (start_archetype_test.go precedence)
unknown archetype rejected on flag path and roadmap-load path, error names the field/feature
archetype orthogonal to enforcement profile (spike order x strict profile)
ArchetypeStepOrder returns clones, not aliases of DefaultStepOrder (mutation safety)
status shows order[0]/archetype, not a hardcoded plan (render_status + integration)
